---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new utility, component, or framework innovation
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What problem does this solve?

Describe the gap. What are you trying to build that VeloraCSS does not currently support?

## Proposed solution

Describe the class, component, or token you would like to see. Include example markup if possible.

```html
<!-- example -->
<div class="vel-...">...</div>
```

## Alternatives considered

Any workarounds you have tried, or other approaches that could solve the same problem.

## Type of change

- [ ] New utility class (e.g. `vel-{property}-{value}`)
- [ ] New component (e.g. `vel-{component}`)
- [ ] New design token (e.g. `--vel-{category}-{name}`)
- [ ] Framework innovation (Color Genetics, Container Intelligence, CSS State Machine, etc.)
- [ ] Docs improvement
- [ ] Other

## Additional context

Links, screenshots, or references to similar patterns in the wild.
